tasks.name: Daily prospect scan
tasks.description: Scan all configured platforms for signal posts matching ICP criteria
acceptance_criteria: All results pass pre_flight_check (DNC, consent, cooldown, fields)
No PII transmitted without SHA-256 hashing
All external calls routed through EventDispatcher
Status report written to orchestrator within 60 seconds of completion
scan_runs row marked complete with found/qualified/stored counts

tasks.name: Calendly booking poll
tasks.description: Poll Calendly for new bookings and move HubSpot deal stages
acceptance_criteria: New bookings matched to prospects within 15 minutes
HubSpot deal stage updated via EventDispatcher only
Pre-call brief generated for every new booking
No booking processed twice (event_id dedup enforced)
